channel.title: Warrior on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Warrior on RaihnForge

item.title: Daily UP 2011.10.26
item.description:
Goal:  Reset frame for hero and come up with some bad guys!

Daily UP vLog: 2011.10.27

Our new hero and old hero, unimpressed by the Borderlands Ogre.

Some good old Spartan inspired armor

NOTES Sprite: Starting with a basic image of a man I will push to create several armor sets from the initial pose.

item.title: Four Oh Four Screen
item.description:
It is customary for websites to have error pages that are somewhat fun. Its frustrating when things break on the internet, so if we are hit with something that makes us smile, it is a bit easier to let go the frustration in running into a glitch.

For FollowGrubby.com I had the idea of using the ‘King of Blades’ Critical Striking the webpage. This idea came to mind as I was thinking of the numbers involved with the error screens. I am, of course a huge fan of Warcraft 3, so when thinking of something that related to such a huge number as 404, I quickly found myself seeing Critical Strike numbers popping out of my poor Arch Mage as he would desperately seek the solace of a Holy Light, and a StormBolt to slow the blade delivered death that was sure to be his destiny.

item.title: The Warriors Burden & Helmet of Chalcidian Shape
item.description:
This is The Warrior’s Burden. As part of a project for my Art History class I decided to draw what I visualized a warrior of the day wearing this esteemed piece of gear. The following sketch is of the helmet itself.

The Warrior’s Burden © Joshua Keyes 2008

Helmet of Chalcidian Shape sketch © Joshua Keyes 2008

item.title: Revenge of Lil' Red Riding Hood
item.description: I drew as a fun riff off of the old fable of little red riding hood.  She is all grown up now, and seeking revenge for her grandmother by slaying all the were wolfs in the land.  I hope to color this sketch at some point.
